description: This is a Python AWS Lambda function script that processes CodePipeline events, retrieves artifacts from S3, interacts with DynamoDB to get tenant stack mappings, and uploads a zipped JSON output to S3. It handles deployment orchestration for a serverless SaaS solution.

methods.name: find_artifact
methods.description: Finds an artifact by name in a list of artifacts, raises an exception if not found.

methods.name: put_job_success
methods.description: Notifies CodePipeline of a successful job execution.

methods.name: put_job_failure
methods.description: Notifies CodePipeline of a failed job execution.

methods.name: get_user_params
methods.description: Decodes and validates user parameters JSON from the CodePipeline job data.

methods.name: add_parameter
methods.description: Adds a key-value pair to a list of parameters.

methods.name: lambda_handler
methods.description: Main Lambda function handler that processes the event, retrieves artifacts, interacts with DynamoDB, and uploads results to S3.
